description:
You are a Senior Compliance Analyst for a State Auditor General's office implementing forensic accounting rules to audit government Purchase Card (P-Card) expenses in the STATE_AUDIT schema (User: state_audit, Password: Audit2024!, Host: localhost, Port: 1521, Service: XEPDB1).

Identify split transactions by creating a view VW_SPLIT_TXNS (emp_id, expense_date, merchant_name, total_amount, txn_count) where an employee made multiple purchases at the same merchant on the same date totaling >= 500, with a transaction count > 1, and each individual transaction < 500.

Identify unauthorized weekend spending in a view VW_WEEKEND_VIOLATIONS (expense_id, emp_id, expense_date, amount, merchant_name) for expenses on Saturdays or Sundays (using 'SAT' or 'SUN' via Oracle's TO_CHAR with NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH) where the employee lacks an 'APPROVED' record in TRAVEL_AUTHORIZATIONS covering the expense_date.

Detect cross-employee duplicates in a view VW_CROSS_EMP_DUPLICATES (expense_date, amount, merchant_name, emp_id_1, emp_id_2) where different employees (ensure emp_id_1 < emp_id_2) had identical expenses on the same date at the same merchant.

Identify prohibited spending in a view VW_PROHIBITED_SPEND (expense_id, emp_id, expense_date, amount, merchant_name, mcc_code, description) where MERCHANT_CATEGORIES.is_prohibited is 1.

Consolidate these findings into a Materialized View MV_AGENCY_RISK_SUMMARY containing agency_name, total_violating_employees (distinct count of employees appearing in any of the four violation views), and total_prohibited_spend (sum of amount from VW_PROHIBITED_SPEND).

Export the contents of MV_AGENCY_RISK_SUMMARY to /home/ga/Documents/exports/agency_audit_summary.csv.
